claims.summary: A complex settled high-entropy state cannot be faithfully represented by one static texture bucket.
claims.disposition: verify current continuous selector, trajectory, gradient, pressure, gap, and probability evidence

claims.summary: Shallow density gradient and high entropy should favor open, settled, and shimmering language over indiscriminate viscosity.
claims.disposition: verify dynamic weighting and exact low-gradient/high-entropy fallback regressions

claims.summary: A 4B fallback may lose the complexity carried by the primary 12B lane even when its telemetry prompt is accurate.
claims.disposition: route a bounded offline primary-versus-fallback fidelity comparison using captured prompts and no peer or runtime mutation

claims.summary: Changing fallback model selection, timeout, or provider priority changes live dialogue behavior.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 Mike/operator approval work with readiness, canary, abort, redaction, and post-change felt review
